alerts.title: Cobalt Strike Beacon Execution Detected
alerts.description: A Cobalt Strike beacon communication sequence was identified running under LSASS shell credentials. The process spawned child processes attempting connection to known Tor exit nodes and suspicious external Command and Control (C2) domains.

timeline.title: Threat Intel Enriched
timeline.details: Target destination IP matched AlienVault OTX active C2 indicators.

timeline.title: Automatic Containment Attempt
timeline.details: Host isolation recommended. Pending manager verification.

alerts.title: LockBit 3.0 Ransomware Execution Attempt
alerts.description: High-volume file modifications and entropy changes consistent with ransomware encryption patterns were detected. The SentinelOne agent intercepted the process and suspended execution.

timeline.title: Ransomware Behavior Blocked
timeline.details: File modification engine locked out. Process suspended.

alerts.title: APT41 Exfiltration Sequence Detected
alerts.description: An unusual outbound SSH/SFTP session exfiltrating approximately 14.5 GB of compressed database backups to an unrecognized external host was flagged by firewall behavioral patterns.

timeline.title: Outbound Data Exfiltration Alert
timeline.details: 14.5 GB volume limit breached on firewall egress rule.

timeline.title: Actor Correlation Match
timeline.details: Destination host IP matched active APT41 indicators.

alerts.title: LSASS Process Memory Dump (Credential Harvesting)
alerts.description: A memory read and dumping operation was performed on the Local Security Authority Subsystem Service (LSASS) using mimikatz-style Windows API calls. Highly suspicious attempt to extract administrator clear-text passwords.

timeline.title: Sysmon Event ID 10 Registered
timeline.details: Process access on lsass.exe request granted to rundll32.exe.

timeline.title: SOC Alert Escalated
timeline.details: Assigned to Tier 2 Lead for credential change validation.

alerts.title: Spearphishing Email Macro Code Execution
alerts.description: User downloaded a phishing document containing macros from a spoofed tax invoice email. The document spawned cmd.exe and downloaded a second-stage Agent Tesla spyware payload.

timeline.title: Phishing Email Open
timeline.details: Exchange recorded email delivery and open trigger.

timeline.title: Macro Process Execution
timeline.details: Word spawned powershell execution. Agent Tesla payload downloaded.

alerts.title: Exchange AD Domain Brute Force Attack
alerts.description: Multiple failed authentication attempts detected against the Exchange Outlook Web Access endpoint. Failed attempts targeted 14 different management accounts within a 3-minute period.

alerts.title: AWS IAM Role Assumption Privilege Escalation
alerts.description: A database-developer role was assumed from an external IP address, followed immediately by security-group policy changes opening database ports to the wider internet.

threatIntel.actor: Internal Account Misconfig / Malicious session hijacking

alerts.title: AD DC Shadow Copy Extraction Attempt (NTDS.dit)
alerts.description: Execution of vssadmin command-line parameters attempting to create a volume shadow copy of the active directory database (ntds.dit). Intention is offline credential decryption.

timeline.title: vssadmin command flagged
timeline.details: Volume creation command intercepted and blocked.

alerts.title: Suspicious PowerShell Ingestion Script Running
alerts.description: An obfuscated base64 encoded PowerShell script was loaded in memory on legal client workstation. The script retrieves telemetry libraries from a Gist repository.

timeline.title: Obfuscated powershell script ran
timeline.details: Bypass execution policy used to load shell script.

alerts.title: Tor Exit Node Connection Attempt
alerts.description: An outgoing connection attempt was observed on standard ports to a registered Tor directory/routing server node. Blocked by egress security policies.

timeline.title: Egress Connection Intercepted
timeline.details: Tor router target blocked by Palo Alto.

campaigns.title: Operation NightShade
campaigns.desc: Coordinated adversary intrusion campaign targeting enterprise domain controllers. Payload execution incorporates Cobalt Strike beacon implants, exfiltrating credential hashes to external C2 nodes.

timeline.details: Active Cobalt Strike beacon detected on Domain Controller.
NTDS.dit Shadow copy extraction attempt on DC-01.

campaigns.title: LockBit Outbreak — Legal Dept
campaigns.desc: Outbreak of LockBit 3.0 ransomware targeting legal department workstations. Endpoint agents contained file system changes, though persistent backdoors require credential purging.

timeline.details: Obfuscated PowerShell loader script verified on WS-LEGAL-01.

campaigns.title: HR Phishing Campaign
campaigns.desc: Spear-phishing vector targeting human resources staff. Delivery uses macro-enabled tax documents deploying Agent Tesla spyware components to capture keystrokes and credentials.

timeline.details: Agent Tesla execution recorded on WS-HR-01.

campaigns.title: Cloud Credential Attack
campaigns.desc: Brute force and credential spray operations directed towards Exchange and Azure Active Directory profiles originating from Tor exit addresses, culminating in AWS IAM role assumptions.

timeline.details: Exchange failed login spray identified from 203.0.113.88.
AWS Database Role assumption from unrecognized IP.

huntingQueries.title: Cobalt Strike Beacon Patterns
huntingQueries.author: secops-mgr
huntingQueries.desc: Scan network traffic for standard beacon communication beacons and matching TCP handshake profiles.

huntingQueries.title: LSASS Memory Dump Attempts
huntingQueries.author: secops-lead
huntingQueries.desc: Identify process access requests on LSASS memory vectors targeting credential extraction.

huntingQueries.title: Tor Exit Node Connections
huntingQueries.author: tier1-lead
huntingQueries.desc: Match outgoing system firewalls logs with registered and updated lists of active Tor routing proxies.

huntingQueries.title: Suspicious PowerShell Scripts
huntingQueries.author: secops-mgr
huntingQueries.desc: Check endpoint command telemetry for obfuscated, base64 encoded, or bypass-policy PowerShell scripts.

huntingQueries.title: Ransomware File Extensions
huntingQueries.author: threat-intel
huntingQueries.desc: Flag spikes in filesystem modifications involving known ransomware output header extensions (e.g. .lockbit, .wannacry).

huntingQueries.title: AWS Privilege Escalation Logs
huntingQueries.author: cloud-sec
huntingQueries.desc: Audit CloudTrail console policies for unusual role assumptions followed by group rules overrides.

compliancePCI.name: Encrypt transmission of cardholder data across open, public networks
Protect all systems against malware and regularly update anti-virus software
Develop and maintain secure systems and software applications
Restrict access to cardholder data by business need-to-know
Identify and authenticate access to system components
Track and monitor all access to network resources and cardholder data
Regularly test security systems and network operational processes
